title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build a real-world multi-agent AI system using LangGraph, featuring four specialized agents (Flight, Hotel, Itinerary, and Final Response) that coordinate to create a travel planning application. The project integrates Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, PostgreSQL for memory, and external APIs for real-time data.
